name: Datalox Science World API Preview
description: A reset/step/finalize/export API over the runnable-world preview.

workspace.list_files.description: List files available in the task workspace artifacts directory.

provenance.inspect.description: Inspect frozen source provenance for the current task artifact.

artifact.read_text.description: Read a text artifact from the current task workspace.

fastqc.parse_report.description: Parse a FastQC text report into structured module statuses and sample statistics.

qc_policy.evaluate.description: Evaluate parsed FastQC evidence against the QC policy and propose the next action.

report_ref.description: Evidence id for the parsed FastQC report.

open_sequence.description: Open a GenBank sequence artifact into the molecule workspace state.

molecule_id.description: Identifier to assign to the loaded molecule.

get_sequence_context.description: Return molecule metadata, features, primers, revision, and optionally the sequence.

include_sequence.description: Whether to include raw sequence text.

upsert_primer.description: Create or update a primer through the molecule domain workspace tool.

expected_revision.description: Current workspace revision expected by the agent.

primer.description: Primer object with id, name, sequence, and molecule_id.

validate_workspace.description: Validate the molecule workspace state after domain edits.
